SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

JR, JUDGE PRO TEM JOHN YUN, SCR JOHN LEWIS, CLERK E.MONTI 4:15 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF COUNSEL, DENNIS HYDE PRE- SENT FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT WERE READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO A STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1906 OCEAN AVE.#12, SF. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT & SEC DEPOSIT. EXECUTION IS STAYED TO 1-25-94, MIDNIGHT. PLTF WAIVES ANY BACK RENT. DEFT HAS OPTION TO EX- TEND TIME TO REMAIN AT PROPERTY UP TO A MAXIMUM OF FOUR WEEKS IF EACH WEEKLY ENCREMENT OF $157.50 IS PAID IN CASH OR MONEY ORDER BY NOON, 1-18-94 TO PLTF COUNSEL. JUDGMENT TO BE VACATED IF ALL CONDITIONS ARE MET. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. IF DEFT SURRENDERS PROPERTY & ADHERES TO ALL CONDITIONS OF STIPJ, THEN JUDGMENT MAY BE VACATED & DISMISSAL W/PREJ TO BE FILED.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDERSON, PATRICIA S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1906 OCEAN AVE. #12, SF., LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT HAS OPTION TO EXTEND TIME TO REMAIN AT PROPERTY UP TO A MAXIMUM OF FOUR WEEKS IF EACH WEEKLY ENCREMENT OF $157.50 IS PAID IN CASH BY NOON, 1-18-94 TO PLTF COUNSEL.
